textByHash.027a49ec44c93c9214879c4c6d5dc51061fd9891: Welcome to the vinery. Can I help you?
textByHash.0a826d497a9283e208d4915673f9d43a96b37ffe: Let's see... First, you'll need to treat the soil with saltpetre. Dig it into the patch with a trowel. The minerals are good for the fruit.
textByHash.21fc777d8a8352614e1314622da252c0b9880c8b: Then plant a grape seed, and just let it grow. I'll look after it, so it won't get diseased.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.2bfeb9a0916dd445169d0edcfab65d31583e81a2: The new Lord Hosidius used to work here as well. He has new duties of course, but that hasn't stopped him coming down to check the wine I produce.
textByHash.3f6c4dc420e88a8ebd13642a287873d81192bca3: When your grapes are ready, pick them and clear the patch so you can grow a new vine.
textByHash.4a4a3892d3252eebca1e841165956058afb3933d: I'm the vintner. I helped Lord Hosidius to develop this land as a vinery, and now it's complete he's put me in charge of production while he works on a new project.
textByHash.658fde095c2092bf15689e0ea8d8625c14155688: I'm the vintner. I helped the late Lord Hosidius develop this land as a vinery. He put me in charge of production once it was completed.
textByHash.68b09ef861caa84eba56b624e1d9736832c52cfc: His son, young Pandur, works here too. Pandur checks the wine I produce. But if you've got any questions about the farming, don't ask Pandur. Ask me instead. He checks the wine too much.
textByHash.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHash.c0ccd092aec4eb2f1fe6d16a0f949f6dac706a26: It's short for 'Gallows'. When I was young, a boy made some improper suggestions to me, so I grabbed him by his neck and held him in the air until he learnt some manners.
textByHash.cfe63e03236a8a7a9e6918cc79fd7847e63f5070: Now, dear, do you need help with the vinery? I'm enjoying the chat, but I have work to do.
textByHash.d739b00c2b52036ef79c12dfd755553b62b39066: So can I help you with anything?
textByHash.d769aebdb7da0f268c147eccba53322efdbb862f: Does that seem clear, or would you like help with something else?
